title: 7 bit wide memory is stored as 8 bit array, but is not masked to 7 bit on read

features.name: unpacked memory with non-power-of-2 bit width element
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array memory declaration where the element bit width is not a power of 2 (e.g., 7-bit elements in an 8-entry array)

features.name: unmasked read from non-power-of-2 width memory
features.description: Code should include a read assignment from an unpacked memory with element width not a power of 2, where the read value is not explicitly masked to the element bit width
